transformer_masked.label: Transformer / masked-reconstruction encoder
transformer_masked.description: Models dominated by Transformer-style visual encoders, masked image modelling, masked reconstruction, or reconstruction-oriented pretraining.

joint_embedding.label: Joint-embedding / contrastive-predictive encoder
joint_embedding.description: Models dominated by contrastive learning, CLIP-style alignment, DINO/BYOL-style representation learning, JEPA, or predictive embedding alignment.

vision_language.label: Vision-language / EO MLLM
vision_language.description: Vision-language models, multimodal LLMs, CLIP/VLM systems, chat models, VQA models, captioning models, and language-grounded EO models.

state_space.label: State-space / sequence model
state_space.description: Models whose dominant architecture is based on Mamba, state-space models, or sequence-state modelling.

embedding_field.label: Embedding product / representation field
embedding_field.description: Models or products whose main output is a reusable geospatial embedding field or representation product rather than only a task-specific checkpoint.

generative_hybrid.label: Any-to-any generative / hybrid multimodal system
generative_hybrid.description: Any-to-any, multimodal generative, hybrid, or modality-to-modality EO systems that can synthesize or reconstruct across multiple observation streams.
